info.title: verlite
info.description: Lightweight automatic versioning via Git tags for continuous delivery for the other build systems.

options.name: --tag-prefix
options.description: Tags starting with this represent versions. [default: v]

options.name: --default-prerelease-phase
options.description:
The default phase for the prerlease label.
For MinVer compatibility, set this to "alpha.0". [default: alpha]

options.name: --min-version
options.description: The minimum RTM version, i.e the destined version. [default: 0.1.0]

options.name: --prerelease-base-height
options.description:
The height for continious deliverable auto heights should begin at.
For MinVer compatibility, set this to 0. [default: 1]

options.name: --version-override
options.description: Force the calculated version to be this version. [default: ]

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: The level of logging to output. [default: normal]

options.name: --build-metadata
options.description: Set the build data to this value. [default: ]

options.name: --show
options.description: The version part which should be written to stdout. [default: all]

options.name: --auto-fetch
options.description: Automatically fetch commits from a shallow repository until a version tag is encountered. [default: False]

options.name: --enable-lightweight-tags
options.description: Create a lightweight tag instead of fetching the remote's. [default: False]

options.name: --enable-shadow-repo
options.description: Use a shadow repro for shallow clones using filter branches to fetch only commits. [default: False]

options.name: --dirty-version-bump
options.description: Any non-ignored modifications to the repo result in a version bump. [default: False]

options.name: --auto-increment
options.description: Which version part should be bumped after an RTM release. [default: patch]

options.name: --filter-tags
options.description: Specify a command to execute, an exit code of 0 will not filter the tag. [default: ]

options.name: --remote
options.description: The remote endpoint to use when fetching tags and commits. [default: origin]

arguments.name: revision
arguments.description: The revision to parse and calculate a version for. [default: ]
